mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_ai_knowledge_base WHERE deleted = b'0' ORDER BY priority DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM t_ai_knowledge_base WHERE category = #{category} AND deleted = b'0' ORDER BY priority DESC
SELECT * FROM t_ai_knowledge_base WHERE domain = #{domain} AND deleted = b'0' ORDER BY priority DESC
SELECT * FROM t_ai_knowledge_base WHERE deleted = b'0' AND enabled = 1 AND embedding IS NOT NULL AND embedding != '' AND content IS NOT NULL AND content != '' ORDER BY priority DESC, id

SELECT * FROM t_ai_knowledge_base WHERE deleted = b'0' AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR keywords LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY priority DESC

SELECT category, domain, source_type AS sourceType, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(CASE WHEN embedding IS NOT NULL AND embedding != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS embeddedCount FROM t_ai_knowledge_base WHERE deleted = b'0' GROUP BY category, domain, source_type ORDER BY count DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_ai_knowledge_base ( category, domain, sub_domain, title, keywords, content, embedding, embedding_model, embedding_dimension, chunk_index, content_hash, source_type, source_name, source_author, core_concepts, application_scenarios, examples, enabled, priority, usage_count, create_user, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{category}, #{domain}, #{subDomain}, #{title}, #{keywords}, #{content}, #{embedding}, #{embeddingModel}, #{embeddingDimension}, #{chunkIndex}, #{contentHash}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceName}, #{sourceAuthor}, #{coreConcepts}, #{applicationScenarios}, #{examples}, #{enabled}, #{priority}, #{usageCount}, #{createUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_ai_knowledge_base SET category = #{category}, domain = #{domain}, sub_domain = #{subDomain}, title = #{title}, keywords = #{keywords}, content = #{content}, embedding = #{embedding}, embedding_model = #{embeddingModel}, embedding_dimension = #{embeddingDimension}, chunk_index = #{chunkIndex}, content_hash = #{contentHash}, source_type = #{sourceType}, source_name = #{sourceName}, source_author = #{sourceAuthor}, core_concepts = #{coreConcepts}, application_scenarios = #{applicationScenarios}, examples = #{examples}, enabled = #{enabled}, priority = #{priority}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE t_ai_knowledge_base SET deleted = b'1' WHERE id = #{id}
